text.title: Video Gen Tools — Worked Example
text.summary: Runway → Luma fallback for a cinematic 5s clip: Runway rejects on policy, Luma succeeds, S3 archival path populated, providers_tried records both attempts.

section.title: Expected behaviour
section.p: Runway dispatch returns FAILED with terse "policy" error → fallback_chain pops Luma → Luma SUCCEEDED → stream-download → ffprobe valid → S3 upload → audit log entry with retries=1 and providers_tried length=2.
